# Nirusaki — Code Shinobi

Nirusaki (ニルサキ) is a Python developer, software engineer, and automation specialist focusing on Telegram bots, web scraping, video encoding pipelines, and custom Linux environments.

## Information & Profiles
- **Website**: https://nirusaki.me
- **Email**: nirusakimalaal@gmail.com
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/nirusaki-malaal
- **Instagram**: https://instagram.com/nirusaki (Username: @Nirusaki)
- **LinkedIn**: https://linkedin.com/in/nirusaki (Username: @Nirusaki)
- **Telegram**: https://t.me/nirusaki (Username: @Nirusaki)
- **YouTube**: https://youtube.com/@nirusaki (Username: @Nirusaki)

## Technologies & Stack
- **Primary Languages**: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, C++, C, Java, Bash
- **Frontend Frameworks & UI**: React, HTML5, CSS3, TailwindCSS
- **Backend & APIs**: FastAPI, Flask, Node.js, Express
- **Databases & Cache**: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis, MySQL
- **AI & Data Science**: NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, Scikit-Learn, TensorFlow
- **DevOps & Deployments**: Docker, Vercel, Heroku, Railway, Netlify, Google Cloud
- **Tools & Core Utilities**: Git, GitHub, Arch Linux, Ubuntu Server, Zsh, FFmpeg, VSCode

## Freelance Work
- **ADM News Bharat** (https://admnewsbharat.com): Built DevOps infrastructure, high-performance database design, frontend, and backend.
- **Ghoomne Chalo Adventures** (https://ghoomnechaloadventures.com): Designed and developed an adventure tourism travel platform.
- **Hola Thrift** (https://holathrift.in): Curated thrift clothing e-commerce platform with checkouts and filters.

## Honors & Awards
- **Google DeepMind Award**: Top 10 Best Gemini Use Case.
- **ElevenLabs Award**: Best Use Case for voice synthesis and translation.
